kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either 16 coins goes with Cedric or someone in the Gate Ward goes with Fletcher.
Between 14 coins and 16 coins, one goes with Cedric and the other with Tanner.
Aldric's levy is at least 4 coins away from the artisan in Riverside.
Cedric's levy is between the artisan in Southgate and the Fletcher.
At least two of Cedric, Edmund, the Mason, and the artisan with 14 coins belong to the South Side.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with Mason; Blacksmith goes with 16 coins; Tanner goes with 14 coins.
Edmund goes with exactly two of Blacksmith, Kingsford, and 22 coins.
Cedric goes with 16 coins if and only if Weaver goes with 18 coins.
Between Aldric and Beatrix, one goes with 18 coins and the other with 20 coins.
If Cedric goes with Kingsford, then 14 coins goes with Godfrey.
Eastcheap goes with exactly two of Beatrix, Fletcher, and 14 coins.
More members of the River Ward are in the Ironmongers' Guild than members of the Gate Ward.
The Mason's levy is lower than both Beatrix and the artisan in Riverside.
